info.name: Notes
info.summary: Markdown notes as real files, with Joplin synchronisation
info.description: A web UI for markdown notes stored as ordinary .md files in a real folder tree — notebooks are folders, tags live in a short note footer, and nothing is hidden in per-item sidecar files, so notes stay editable anywhere. Supports templates (with variable substitution) for things like lab notebooks, todos via tags, and LaTeX/mhchem rendering. A companion sync layer keeps the same files in sync with Joplin on desktop and mobile.
info.author: Frederik Orellana, DTU
